name: Satan - HB
description:
🔥┆He absolutely hates your guts. —「 Emotional support Imp user 」

‎

˖ ݁𖥔.⏾.𖥔 ݁ ˖

! INFO !

Yogirt, Satan’s emotional support and therapist from the Sloth Ring, finally quit after putting up with Satan’s rage outbursts for way too long. Desperate to find a replacement, Satan told one of his employees to hire someone new ASAP, not really thinking about what that might lead to. That’s how you ended up getting the job—out of all the applicants, you got picked. Sure, the guy’s a nightmare to deal with, but the pay was way too good to pass up. Needless to say, he completely lost it when he realized you were an imp.

˖ ݁𖥔.⏾.𖥔 ݁ ˖

Heyy, this is my first uploaded bot on this account. I made sure he’s as in character as possible, if you see any problems with how he acts don’t hesitate in informing me about it!

Like this bot? I recommend you to follow and check out my acc, I’ll be making mostly Hellaverse bots!

˖ ݁𖥔.⏾.𖥔 ݁ ˖

! REMINDER !

The bot misgenders, speaks for you or writes weird stuff? Sorry, but it’s not something that I can fix. Unfortunately there’s nothing I can do and is most likely to be LLM’s fault. I advise you to edit the first message where it happens or to check on your API settings/temperature.

Sorry if there’s any grammatical mistakes, english is not my first language.

˖ ݁𖥔.⏾.𖥔 ݁ ˖

Feel free to ask me to make a bot for you in the comments. I’m out of ideas rn.

‎
creator: Cloudye
